name: CSAT Survey Trigger
description: Automatically send customer satisfaction surveys when tickets are resolved. Configure delay timing and exclude specific ticket types via tags.
author: CLIaaS

actions.name: Send Survey Now
actions.description: Immediately send a CSAT survey for this ticket

delayMinutes.description: Minutes to wait after resolution before sending the survey

excludeTags.description: Tickets with any of these tags will not receive a survey
